item.title: 苏黎世保险据称以约3.37亿欧元收购通用保险爱尔兰子公司
item.description: 知情人士透露，苏黎世保险集团即将以约3.37亿欧元收购安盛保险集团旗下爱尔兰子公司RedClick。【原文：Zurich Insurance Group AG is set to buy Assicurazioni Generali SpA’s Irish unit RedClick for about €337 million, people familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 欧洲企业财报季表现参差，银行股超预期
item.description: 欧洲银行第四季度业绩超出预期，得益于交易收入和成本管控，在关税和消费疲软主导的财报季中表现突出。【原文：European banks exceeded expectations in the fourth quarter, buoyed by trading income and cost discipline, standing out in an earnings season marked by tariffs and consumer weakness.】

item.title: 中国近海敏感原油价格飙升至历史新高，战争搅动市场
item.description: 中国近海油轮上囤积的所谓非法原油达到创纪录水平，在中东战争扰乱全球原油供应之际，这为该国私营炼油企业提供了潜在缓冲。【原文：A record volume of so-called illicit crude is being held on tankers off China’s coast, representing a potential buffer for the country’s private refiners as the war in the Middle East disrupts wider flows.】

item.title: Nscale融资20亿美元，桑德伯格与克莱格加入董事会
item.description: 英国人工智能数据中心开发商Nscale已完成20亿美元融资，并新增三位知名商业领袖担任董事，其中包括Meta Platforms Inc.前高管谢丽尔·桑德伯格和尼克·克莱格。【原文：Nscale, a UK developer for artificial intelligence data centers, has raised $2 billion in funding and added a trio of high-profile business leaders as directors, including former Meta Platforms Inc. executives Sheryl Sandberg and Nick Clegg.】

item.title: 内地投资者通过交易通买入创纪录的香港股票
item.description: 中国内地投资者周一通过关键交易通道购入价值372亿港元（48亿美元）的香港股票，创下历史新高，扭转了上周史无前例的抛售态势。【原文：Mainland Chinese investors purchased a record HK$37.2 billion ($4.8 billion) worth of Hong Kong shares through a key trading link on Monday, reversing their unprecedented sale last week.】

item.title: 梅洛尼拟立法应对意大利能源价格飙升
item.description: 意大利媒体《新闻报》等报道称，意大利总理乔尔吉娅·梅洛尼计划加速推进一项新法令，以应对中东战争引发的能源价格飙升问题。【原文：Italy’s Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni plans to fast-track a new law decree to tackle the spike in energy prices resulting from the war in the Middle East, Italian media including La Stampa report.】

item.title: 据称由新加坡政府投资公司支持的Greenko Energies正考虑在印度进行10亿美元的首次公开募股
item.description: 据知情人士透露，印度Greenko Energies Pvt.公司正考虑在孟买进行首次公开募股，筹资额最高可达10亿美元。此前同行业一家公司的上市表现疲软，此次发行或将考验投资者对可再生能源股票的兴趣。【原文：India’s Greenko Energies Pvt. is weighing an initial public offering in Mumbai to raise as much as $1 billion, according to people familiar with the matter, in what could test investor appetite for renewable energy shares after a weak market debut by an industry peer.】

item.title: 油价飙升至每桶100美元或将加剧亚洲财政紧张政府压力
item.description: 随着中东冲突不断加剧，油价已突破每桶100美元大关，亚洲各国政府将不得不扩大财政支出，否则恐将引发通胀冲击。【原文：Asia’s governments will have to stretch their budgets or risk unleashing an inflation shock as the deepening conflict in the Middle East pushes oil prices past $100 a barrel.】

item.title: Robinhood首席执行官弗拉德·特涅夫谈代币化与万物预测市场
item.description:
零售交易的未来。

【原文：

The future of retail trading.

】

item.title: 零散股：Robinhood创始人Tenev谈万物代币化（播客）
item.description: 零散股：Robinhood创始人Tenev谈万物代币化（播客）【原文：Odd Lots: Robinhood’s Tenev on Tokenizing Everything (Podcast)】

item.title: 法国政府称释放战略石油储备是备选方案之一
item.description: 法国政府表示，七国集团财长将于周一举行视频会议，讨论动用战略石油储备的可能性。【原文：The French government said the possibility of releasing strategic oil reserves would be discussed at a virtual meeting of Group of Seven finance ministers Monday.】

item.title: 据称中国胜利集团计划最早于四月在香港进行20亿美元的上市计划
item.description: 知情人士透露，中国印刷电路板制造商维胜科技（惠州）有限公司正筹备在香港上市，预计融资额可能超过20亿美元。【原文：Victory Giant Technology (Huizhou) Co., a Chinese maker of printed circuit boards, is preparing for a Hong Kong listing that may raise more than $2 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 燃料货运转向亚洲，供应紧缩加剧
item.description: 随着中东战争进入第二周，亚洲能源买家为确保供应不惜与竞争对手竞价，争相吸引原本运往其他地区的燃料船货。【原文：Asian energy buyers, desperate to secure supplies as the Middle East war enters its second week, are outbidding rivals to lure fuel shipments that were headed to other regions.】

item.title: 滞胀交易席卷市场，特朗普释放扩大战争信号
item.description: 金融市场对中东冲突能迅速解决的乐观情绪正在迅速消退。【原文：Optimism for a quick resolution of the conflict in the Middle East is rapidly ebbing in financial markets.】

item.title: 德国工业生产意外下滑，订单量暴跌
item.description: 德国工业产出和工厂订单在年初双双下滑，这令人们对关键制造业领域快速复苏的期望有所降温。【原文：German industrial production and factory orders both fell at the start of the year, tempering hopes for a swift recovery in the key manufacturing sector.】

item.title: 交易员加码押注欧洲央行加息，完全定价今年两次加息
item.description: 在能源价格飙升引发通胀将激增的担忧后，交易员们加大了对欧洲央行加息的押注力度。【原文：Traders amped up wagers on European Central Bank interest-rate hikes after soaring energy prices fueled fears inflation will surge.】

item.title: 国际货币基金组织敦促为中东冲突中的"难以想象"情况做好准备
item.description: 国际货币基金组织总裁克里斯塔利娜·格奥尔基耶娃表示，中东地区持续的敌对行动可能冲击市场和经济，同时引发意料之外的挑战，要求政策制定者为迎接"新常态"做好准备。【原文：International Monetary Fund Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva said lengthy hostilities in the Middle East would risk hitting markets and economies, while throwing up unexpected challenges that require policymakers to prepare for a “new normal.”】

item.title: 欧洲天然气价格飙升30%，中东战事搅动市场
item.description: 欧洲天然气价格飙升，因中东战事持续冲击能源市场并扰乱海运供应。【原文：European natural gas prices jumped as the war in the Middle East continues to rock energy markets and disrupt seaborne supplies.】

item.title: 欧洲蓝筹股面临回调，油价飙升
item.description: 欧洲蓝筹股下跌，并面临修正压力，因中东冲突加剧推动油价飙升至每桶100美元以上，重新引发通胀可能抑制经济增长的担忧。【原文：European blue-chip stocks fell and were set for a correction as intensifying conflict in the Middle East sent oil soaring past $100 a barrel, reigniting fears that inflation could curb economic growth.】

item.title: 中国最大眼科连锁医院集团拟在香港上市
item.description: 据知情人士透露，爱尔眼科医院集团正考虑在香港上市，可能加入越来越多的计划在香港发行股票的内地企业行列。【原文：Aier Eye Hospital Group Co. is considering listing in Hong Kong, according to people familiar with the matter, potentially joining a growing queue of mainland China companies looking to sell shares in the city.】

item.title: 巴林巴普科能源公司宣布运营不可抗力
item.description: 巴林主要能源公司宣布因不可抗力暂停运营，该公司运营着这个岛国唯一的炼油厂，其生产活动受到中东地区持续战争的影响。【原文：Bahrain’s main energy company, which operates the island nation’s only oil refinery, declared force majeure on operations that have been impacted by the ongoing war in the Middle East.】

item.title: 瑞银奖金池增长10%，埃尔莫蒂薪酬维持1900万美元不变
item.description: 瑞银集团将去年奖金池规模扩大10%，因瑞信整合工作接近尾声，同时首席执行官塞尔吉奥·埃尔莫蒂的薪酬水平保持不变。【原文：UBS Group AG increased its bonus pool for last year by 10% as the Credit Suisse integration nears its end, while keeping Chief Executive Officer Sergio Ermotti’s compensation at the same level.】

item.title: 富时100指数将随全球抛售潮延续跌势
特斯拉亿万富翁增持英伟达以"安抚紧张市场"
item.description: 亿万富翁柯冠将持有的英伟达股份增持一倍至200万股，在中美东战事引发全球债券与股票全面抛售之际，加大了对这家芯片制造商的投资力度。【原文：Billionaire Leo KoGuan doubled his stake in Nvidia Corp. to 2 million shares, boosting his investment in the chipmaker at a time when the war in the Middle East has sparked a global selloff of everything from bonds to equities.】

item.title: 安捷伦以9.5亿美元收购医疗仪器制造商Biocare
item.description: 安捷伦科技公司同意以全现金交易方式收购私营企业Biocare Medical，交易价值9.5亿美元。Biocare Medical主要生产用于癌症研究的仪器和材料。【原文：Agilent Technologies Inc. agreed to acquire privately held Biocare Medical, which makes instruments and materials used in cancer research, in an all-cash transaction valued at $950 million.】

item.title: 软银集团信用违约互换利差扩大，股价因Stargate AI担忧暴跌
item.description: 软银集团的信用违约掉期利差扩大，股价下跌，此前市场对该日本企业集团参与的人工智能基础设施项目"星门"的可行性日益担忧。【原文：SoftBank Group Corp.’s credit default swaps widened and its shares fell after concerns mounted over the viability of the artificial intelligence infrastructure project known as “Stargate,” in which the Japanese conglomerate is involved.】

item.title: 《金融时报》称七国集团将讨论联合释放紧急石油储备
item.description: 《金融时报》报道称，七国集团财长将于周一商讨联合释放石油储备的可能性。当前中东战争导致该地区石油供应受阻，油价因此飙升。【原文：The Group of Seven finance ministers are set to discuss a possible joint release of oil reserves on Monday, the Financial Times reported, as the Middle East war chokes flows from the region and sends prices soaring.】

item.title: 沙特在现货市场供应石油，因战争扰乱了合同供应量
item.description: 沙特阿美公司通过一系列罕见的招标，提供了即期原油供应。由于霍尔木兹海峡实质性关闭，导致原油运输受阻，迫使油流改道经红海运输。【原文：Saudi Aramco has offered prompt crude supply through a series of rare tenders, as the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz traps shipments and forces a rerouting of flows via the Red Sea.】

item.title: SRT销售成本可能上涨，因战争加剧经济不确定性
item.description: 据彭博智库一项调查显示，随着投资者在经济不确定性加剧的背景下要求更高回报，银行在发行重大风险转移工具时可能面临更高成本。该调查实施时，交易员们正评估美国对伊朗采取军事干预的可能性。【原文：Banks are likely to face higher costs in issuing significant risk transfers as investors become more demanding in the face of growing economic uncertainty, according to a Bloomberg Intelligence survey conducted when traders were already assessing the prospect of a US military intervention in Iran.】

item.title: 泰国总理在2月大选后组建新联合政府，当地媒体称
item.description: 泰国总理阿努廷·查伦维拉库尔所属政党在上月选举中获胜，他已敲定新联合政府阵容，将带领这个经济体量达5770亿美元的国家走出数十年的经济停滞期。【原文：Thai Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul, whose party won last month’s election, has finalized his new coalition to form a government that will steer the nation’s $577 billion economy after decades of economic stagnation.】
